Married: before 1265 in …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Macdougall於1250年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill38歲，母親Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia46歲。他於1265年之前與Julienne Comyn在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1283年登記服兵役。他去世於1308年3月24日在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特奧班享年58歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾登利。

nameMeanings.name: Macdougall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDougall
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Dubhghaill, ‘son of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was originally a byname used to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from the fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDowell and Doyle .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Macdougall was born in 1250, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill, was 38 and his mother, Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, was 46. He married Julienne Comyn before 1265, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1283. He died on 24 March 1308, in Oban, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Dunollie, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Macdougall est né en 1250, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Julienne Comyn avant 1265, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1283. Il est décédé le 24 mars 1308, à Oban, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Dunollie, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Macdougall 1250 in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill 38 und seine Mutter Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia 46. Er hat vor 1265 in Argyll, Scotland Julienne Comyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1283 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 24. März 1308 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Oban, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunollie, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Macdougall è nato il nel 1250 nel Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Julienne Comyn prima del 1265, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1283. Morì il 24 marzo 1308, nel Oban, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunollie, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Macdougallが1250年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaillは38歳，母Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadiaは46歳であった。1265年以前にスコットランドアルグイルでJulienne Comynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1283年に兵役登録をした。彼は1308年3月24日にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトオバンで58歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルダノリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Macdougall(이)가 1250년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1265년 이전 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Julienne Comyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1283년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1308년 3월 24일 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 오반에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 던리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Macdougall nasceu em 1250, em Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Julienne Comyn antes 1265, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1283. Ele faleceu em 24 de março de 1308, em Oban, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunollie, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Macdougall родился в 1250 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Julienne Comyn перед 1265 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1283 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 24 марта 1308 г. в местности обань, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности дунолли, аргилл, Шотландия.

Se casó con Julienne Comyn antes de 1265, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1283. Murió el 24 de marzo de 1308, en Oban, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Dunollie, Argyll, Scotland.
